title: Trimble Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Call and Webcast
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif. , July 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) will hold a conference call on Friday, August 5, 2022 at 5 a.m.

title: New Scanning and Imaging Solution from Trimble Simplifies 3D Deliverables
text: Integrated Field and Office Environment Makes Scanning Easier to Transform Data into Decisions SUNNYVALE, Calif. , July 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) introduced today the new Trimble® X12 scanning system to the geospatial scanning portfolio.
